creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't actually use anything erlang*. Runtime wasn't tested while build with TEST=on fails.

  $ make WITH=TEST
  ...
  ======================== EUnit ========================
  module 'gen_utp'
  module 'gen_utp_sup'
  module 'gen_utp_app'
  module 'gen_utp_opts'
    gen_utp_opts: validate_test...*timed out*
  undefined

Jimmy, do you want to adopt the port?
